title: Ocugen Q3 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Ocugen Q3 2024 Earnings Summary. Key Business Developments: Ocugen advanced its gene therapy pipeline across three clinical programs during Q3 2024. OCU400 (Retinitis Pigmentosa): Received Health Canada approval to initiate Phase 3 limelight trial in Canada. Obtained FDA expanded access program (EAP) approval for adult RP patients. Phase 3 enrollment on track to complete in first half of 2025. Positioned as the first Phase 3 gene therapy candidate treating RP regardless of mutation. OCU410 & OCU410ST (Geographic Atrophy & Stargardt Disease): Nine GA patients dosed in Phase 1 with favorable safety profile; Phase 2 enrollment underway. Phase 1/2 dosing completed for Stargardt candidate with Data Safety Monitoring Board approval to advance. Stargardt received orphan drug designation from FDA. OCU200 (Diabetic Macular Edema): FDA cleared Investigational Drug Application for Phase 1 trial of this biologic candidate. Financial Position: The company secured $30 million from Avenue Capital Group extending runway into Q1 2026. Q3 operating expenses totaled $14.4 million, compared to $16.1 million year-over-year. Management Outlook: Leadership emphasized modifier gene therapy's differentiated approach targeting multiple disease pathways rather than single-gene solutions.
